core_mechanism: Weierstrass/Hadamard canonical-product factorization of a meromorphic function from its prescribed divisor — reconstructing an analytic function as an infinite product over a discrete spectrum (its zeros/poles), with auxiliary Barnes-G and gamma factors absorbing growth order and multiplicity data so that the divisor is read off from spectral quantities
brief_reason: The abstract states a factorization formula expressing the zeta function as a Weierstrass product over the Laplace resonances together with Barnes G-functions and gamma functions, interpreting its zeros and poles via spectral and geometric entities.
